en: Thank you. Miles is playing with tonight's musical guest.
ko: 마일스가 오늘 밤의 음악 게스트와 함께 놀고 있어요.

en: He's a hip-hop superstar. Here is Wiz Khalifa!
♪♪ Pleasure to see you, man. Thank you for coming out.
Wiz, Jerry, come on up. Hi. Good luck in the game. How you doing?
Miles, Wiz. Wiz, Miles. What's up, man? Good to see you.
Here's how the game works. Miles, you're going to start the game by pressing start on this buzzer here
ko: 만나서 반가워. 게임 진행 방식은 이래.

en: and then drawing a clue from the top of the pile. You get your teammate, Wiz, to guess the clue as quickly as possible
ko: 그리고 더미에서 가장 위에 있는 단서를 뽑아.

en: and then hand the buzzer off to the person on your right.
ko: 어떤 신체 동작도 하고 뭐든지 말할 수 있어.

en: You can make any physical gesture and say anything.
You can't say any word in the actual... Do you remember when we played Pictionary?
Yeah, yeah, yeah. If you're holding the buzzer when it goes off,
ko: 버튼을 들고 있을 때 소리가 나면 너희 팀은 그 라운드를 잃어.

en: your team loses that round. First team to win two rounds wins the game.
Let's take our positions. I'll go here. Jim, you'll go here. Yeah, yeah.
ko: 자, 제자리로 가자. 나는 여기 갈게.
